description_long: This apartment building features a modern, boxy design with two visible floors. The front facade includes a combination of large glass doors, windows, and two distinct wooden entry doors, one on each floor. The upper floor is equipped with two balconies, one with a solid railing and the other with a more open, metal railing. The windows are symmetrically arranged, providing a balanced and contemporary appearance. The sides and rear of the building are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The exterior is finished in a clean white color with subtle accents, giving it a sleek and urban look.
description: A modern two-story apartment building with balconies, large windows, and a clean white facade.
description_view_0: The front view shows two floors, two balconies, multiple windows, and two main entry doors.
description_view_1: The left side view is mostly a solid wall with a balcony edge visible, showing minimal openings.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a single window and a balcony, with the rest of the wall being solid.
description_view_3: The right side view is almost entirely solid, with only the edge of the balconies and a hint of the front visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with pairs of windows flanking the doors and additional windows on the upper floor. The sides and rear have minimal or single window openings, emphasizing privacy.
